governance.status: C prime polygonal Bahn in collatzOctEmbed ℝ⁸
governance.metric: Euclidean on O ≅ ℝ⁸ (primary); optional S⁷ after normalize
governance.not_claimed: octonion-multiplication geodesic; E8 lattice shortest path; infinitude or distribution theorems; octonionic geodesic physics beyond residue-class gap + embed coordinates
governance.analysis: null-eabc N1–N5, N8 on collatzOctEmbed Bahn

N8.name: N8_embed_identity
N8.statement: L = sqrt(gap^2 + Δe1^2 + Δe2^2 + Δχ7^2) exactly (float)
N8.interpretation: If holds: Bahn 'patterns' are residue-class gaps in embed coordinates, not extra octonionic geodesic physics.

N1.name: N1_gap_dominance
N1.statement: L ≈ |q-p| up to O(1) embed correction

N2.name: N2_same_family_mod12
N2.statement: same-family on global Bahn only for gap ∈ 12ℤ

N3.name: N3_family_balance
N3.statement: family counts A/B/C/E roughly equal (soft sanity)
N3.note: Soft band 15–35%; not a formal uniformity test.

N4.name: N4_rotor_shuffle
N4.statement: rotor edges A→B,B→C,E→A,C→E match shuffle of family sequence with same multiset
N4.interpretation: holds=True: rotor flux compatible with family marginals; large |z|: possible prime-channel dynamics beyond marginals [C].

N5.name: N5_CE_anomaly_gap_stratified
N5.statement: ⟨residual L−gap⟩ at C→E not larger than other transitions with same gap
N5.interpretation: holds=True: no gap-matched C→E residual anomaly; else descriptive [C] curiosity only.

summary.expectation: N8 identity ⇒ patterns are residue-class gaps in embed coords; N4/N5 probe channel dynamics of transition counts [C].
